title: The BEST AI for 4K images. Free & fast
summary: Nvidia's Pixel Diffusion (PiD) is presented as a best-in-class open source model for generating 4K images. The video demonstrates its capabilities, compares it against SeedVR2, and shows integration workflows with ComfyUI for text-to-image and upscaling tasks.
